text:
On Tue, 24 Aug 1999, James Howard wrote:

> + 			/* 
> + 			 * For Unix 98 compatability.
> + 			 */
> + 			/* FALLTHROUGH */

style(9) says this can be written as

			/* For Unix 98 compatability. */
			/* FALLTHROUGH */
